text.title: pricing-research Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pricing-research as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent suggests 10-15% capture rate regardless of product category or market context.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The 10-20% folk number appears frequently in startup content. LLMs apply it uniformly without category adjustment.

failure-mode.description: Agent computes annual price as "12 x monthly x 0.83" (17% off) instead of "10 x monthly" (2 months free).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Percentage-discount framing triggers percentage math. The "2 months free" framing should produce 10 x monthly but agents revert to percentage calculation.
